HPAIVpredict-results

Aldair Martinez Pineda

2026-03-26

Loading packages

# load necessary packages
library(readxl)
## Warning: le package 'readxl' a été compilé avec la version R 4.4.3
library(stats)
library(ggplot2)
## Warning: le package 'ggplot2' a été compilé avec la version R 4.4.3
library(ggrepel)
## Warning: le package 'ggrepel' a été compilé avec la version R 4.4.3
library(ggthemes)
## Warning: le package 'ggthemes' a été compilé avec la version R 4.4.3
library(dplyr)
## Warning: le package 'dplyr' a été compilé avec la version R 4.4.3
## 
## Attachement du package : 'dplyr'
## Les objets suivants sont masqués depuis 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## Les objets suivants sont masqués depuis 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(bioseq)
## Warning: le package 'bioseq' a été compilé avec la version R 4.4.3
library(stringi)
## Warning: le package 'stringi' a été compilé avec la version R 4.4.3
library(writexl)
## Warning: le package 'writexl' a été compilé avec la version R 4.4.3
library(ggpubr)
## Warning: le package 'ggpubr' a été compilé avec la version R 4.4.3
predictionH5 <- read_excel("crnaDDG.xlsx")
## New names:
## • `` -> `...1`
predictionH5crna <- read_excel("vrnaDDG.xlsx")
## New names:
## • `` -> `...1`
# positions are not properly defined: correcting them
predictionH5$pos <- predictionH5$pos + 1
predictionH5crna$pos <- predictionH5crna$pos + 1

Model_linReg3.1 <- readRDS("Model_linReg3.1.rds")

Useful functions

# Computation of the codon analysis
databasepredictor <- function(predictions,
                              neighbornum,
                              neighborblocknum,
                              modelselect,
                              blocked,
                              codon,
                              orientation,
                              correctionfactor) {
  # create value for mismatch analysis
  targets <- predictions
  targets$match <- 1
  targets[substr(targets$structure, 1, 1) == ".", ]$match <- 0
  targets$template <- gsub('T', 'U', targets$template)
  
  # get only the columns of interest from or objective sequence
  variables <- data.frame(
    DDG = targets$DDG,
    match = targets$match,
    adenine = targets$insertion,
    decalage = targets$decalage,
    neighbor = targets$neighbor,
    matchmismatch = targets$matchmismatch
  )
  
  # replace NA values by x
  variables[is.na(variables$adenine), ]$adenine <- "X"
  
  # transform the adenine column to 1 if the insertion is single adenine, and to 0 otherwise
  variables[variables$adenine == "A", ]$adenine <- 1
  variables[variables$adenine != 1, ]$adenine <- 0
  variables$adenine <- as.numeric(variables$adenine)
  
  if (orientation == "crna") {
    targets$pos <- rev(targets$pos) + correctionfactor
    targets$falsepos = targets$pos
  }
  # predict the insertion frequency
  targets$predictedfreq <- predict.lm(modelselect, newdata = variables)
  # create the vector containing samples
  samples <- unique(targets$sample)
  
  # create the mask to select values
  masktargets2 <- targets$predictedfreq > -20 &
    targets$decalage != 0
  predictionscutm <- targets[masktargets2, ]
  
  # change all predicted values that have a frequency not favorable by backtrack to -6
  if (blocked == "yes") {
    masktargets3 <- (
      predictionscutm$pathway > 2.5 |
        predictionscutm$neighbor >= neighbornum |
        predictionscutm$neighborblock >= neighborblocknum |
        predictionscutm$equilibrated < 1 |
        predictionscutm$pathwayb > 7.4
    )
    predictionscutm[masktargets3, ]$predictedfreq <- -6
  }
  
  if (codon == "yes") {
    predictionscutm[nchar(predictionscutm$insertion) %% 3 != 0, ]$predictedfreq <- -6
  }
  
  # finally aggregate all positions using the sum of possibilities inside a position
  predictionscutm$predictedfreqdec <- 10 ** (predictionscutm$predictedfreq)
  
  # poly adenine insertions are always placed at the beginning of the adenine stretch by variant callers
  # to simulate this behavior we do the same mapping them at the beginning of the adenine stretch
  predictionscutm$falsepos <- predictionscutm$pos
  
  selected8A <- unique(predictionscutm[grep(c("8A|RKKR"), predictionscutm$sample), ]$sample)
  selected6A <- unique(predictionscutm[grep("6A", predictionscutm$sample), ]$sample)
  selectedShim24a2b <- unique(predictionscutm[grep("Shim24a2b", predictionscutm$sample), ]$sample)
  
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "A" &
                    ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) |
                       (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)
                    ), ]$falsepos <- 1017
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AA" &
                    ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) |
                       (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)
                    ), ]$falsepos <- 1017
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAA" &
                    ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) |
                       (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)
                    ), ]$falsepos <- 1017
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAAA" &
                    ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) |
                       (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)
                    ), ]$falsepos <- 1017
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAAAA" &
                    ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) |
                       (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)
                    ), ]$falsepos <- 1017
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAAAAA" &
                    ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) |
                       (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)
                    ), ]$falsepos <- 1017
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAAAAAA" &
                    ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) |
                       (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)
                    ), ]$falsepos <- 1017
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAAAAAAA" &
                    ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) |
                       (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)
                    ), ]$falsepos <- 1017
  
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "A" &
                    (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A), ]$falsepos <- 1019
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AA" &
                    (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A), ]$falsepos <- 1019
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAA" &
                    (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A), ]$falsepos <- 1019
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAAA" &
                    (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A), ]$falsepos <- 1019
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAAAA" &
                    (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A), ]$falsepos <- 1019
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAAAAA" &
                    (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A), ]$falsepos <- 1019
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAAAAAA" &
                    (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A), ]$falsepos <- 1019
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAAAAAAA" &
                    (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A), ]$falsepos <- 1019
  
  # do the same for the PR8
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "A" &
                    (predictionscutm$sample == "PR8-C6a"), ]$falsepos <- 1013
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AA" &
                    (predictionscutm$sample == "PR8-C6a"), ]$falsepos <- 1013
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion == "AAA" &
                    (predictionscutm$sample == "PR8-C6a"), ]$falsepos <- 1013
  predictionscutm[(predictionscutm$decalage > 7) &
                    (predictionscutm$sample == "EF-8A") &
                    (predictionscutm$pos > 1011) &
                    (predictionscutm$pos < 1014), ]$falsepos <- 1013
  
  # create the variable to aggregate, transforming the log of observations to absolute frequency
  predictionscutm$predictedfreqlog <- 10 ** (predictionscutm$predictedfreq)
  
  # modify the insertion variable to make it look like a real event annotation
  predictionscutm$insertion <- paste(as.character(predictionscutm$decalage),
                                     predictionscutm$insertion,
                                     sep = "")

  # aggregate the variables that share the same dummypos, decalage, sample, insertion, usign
  predictionscutmfalse <- aggregate(
    predictedfreqdec ~ falsepos + sample + insertion + template + decalage,
    data = predictionscutm,
    FUN = sum,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  
  # remove insertions below threshold for easier visualization
  predictionscutmfalse[predictionscutmfalse$predictedfreqdec < 10 ** -5, ]$predictedfreqdec <-
    10 ** -7
  
  return(predictionscutmfalse)
}

mergecrnaetvrna <- function(vrnacutsum, crnacutsum) {
  crnaplusvrna <- merge(
    vrnacutsum,
    crnacutsum,
    by.x = c("pos", "sample"),
    by.y = c("pos", "sample"),
    all = TRUE
  )
  
  crnaplusvrna[is.na(crnaplusvrna$predictedfreq.x), ]$predictedfreq.x <-
    min(vrnacutsum$predictedfreq)
  crnaplusvrna[is.na(crnaplusvrna$predictedfreq.y), ]$predictedfreq.y <-
    min(vrnacutsum$predictedfreq)
  
  crnaplusvrna[is.na(crnaplusvrna$HPAA.x), ]$HPAA.x <- "N"
  crnaplusvrna[is.na(crnaplusvrna$HPAA.y), ]$HPAA.y <- "N"
  
  crnaplusvrna$predictedfreq = pmax(crnaplusvrna$predictedfreq.x,
                                    crnaplusvrna$predictedfreq.y)
  crnaplusvrna$HPAA = paste(crnaplusvrna$HPAA.x, crnaplusvrna$HPAA.y, sep = ",")
  
  # correct the motifs that have NA values using dplyr
  crnaplusvrna <- crnaplusvrna %>% 
    mutate(wtmotifs = coalesce(wtmotifs.x, wtmotifs.y))
  
  crnaplusvrna <- crnaplusvrna %>% mutate(motifs = coalesce(motifs.x, motifs.y))
  
  crnaplusvrna <- crnaplusvrna %>% 
    mutate(sampleshort = coalesce(sampleshort.x, sampleshort.y))
  
  crnaplusvrna <- crnaplusvrna[order(crnaplusvrna$sample, crnaplusvrna$pos, decreasing = FALSE), ]

  return(crnaplusvrna)
}

inserorganizerv2 <- function(df) {
  df <- df %>% mutate(.rowid = row_number())
  
  df_work <- df %>%
    filter(predictedfreqdec > 1e-6) %>%
    mutate(insertion_key = sapply(insertion, function(x) {
      seq_part <- gsub("^[0-9]+", "", x)
      paste(sort(strsplit(seq_part, "")[[1]]), collapse = "")
    })) %>%
    group_by(sample, insertion_key) %>%
    mutate(
      totalfreq = sum(predictedfreqdec, na.rm = TRUE),
      keep_row = row_number() == which.max(predictedfreqdec),
      predictedfreqdec = ifelse(keep_row, totalfreq, 1e-7)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(-insertion_key, -totalfreq, -keep_row)
  
  df_ignore <- df %>% filter(predictedfreqdec <= 1e-6)
  
  df_out <- bind_rows(df_work, df_ignore) %>%
    arrange(.rowid) %>%
    select(-.rowid) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  return(df_out)
}

plotinsertions <- function(toplot, CS, start, end) {
  plotinser <- ggplot(toplot, aes(y = predictedfreqdec, x = falsepos))  +
    facet_wrap( ~ sample, ncol = 2, scales = "free") + scale_y_log10() + 
    theme(panel.spacing = unit(0, "points")) + 
    theme(panel.border = element_rect(
      fill = "transparent",
      # Needed to add the border
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 1
    )) +
    geom_vline(
      xintercept = CS,
      col = "gray",
      linetype = "dashed",
      size = 0.7
    ) + theme_tufte() + theme(
      axis.line = element_line(),
      strip.text = element_text(size = 11, family = "Arial"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(
        angle = 45,
        vjust = 0.5,
        hjust = 1
      ),
      text = element_text(size = 13, family = "Arial")
    ) + scale_y_log10(limits = c(2 * 10 ** -6.5, 2 * 10 ** -1)) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(start, end), breaks = toplot$falsepos) + geom_segment(
      aes(
        x = falsepos,
        xend = falsepos,
        y = 2 * 10 ** -6,
        yend = predictedfreqdec
      ),
      size = 10,
      alpha = 0.8,
      color = "cyan4",
      show.legend = F
    ) + geom_hline(
      yintercept = 2 * 10 ** -6,
      col = "brown",
      linetype = "dashed",
      size = 0.7
    ) + annotate(
      "text",
      x = c(CS),
      y = c(2 * 10 ** -1),
      label = c("HA1  HA2") ,
      color = "violetred",
      size = 3 ,
      angle = 0,
      fontface = "bold"
    ) +
    geom_label_repel(
      aes(label = insertion),
      color = "darkviolet" ,
      show.legend = FALSE,
      size = 3.5,
      check_overlap = T,
      fontface = "bold",
      force = 0.002,
      force_pull = 4,
      max.overlaps = 25
    ) + geom_text(
      aes(
        x = falsepos,
        y = 2 * 10 ** -6.5,
        label = template
      ),
      color = "violetred" ,
      show.legend = FALSE,
      family = "Arial"
    ) + scale_color_hue(direction = -1, h.start = 80)
  
  return(plotinser)
}

Analysis

# This line predicts the insertions in your example sequences, and creates the xlsx ouput containing all insertions that should be observed in a given sequence

predictionH5[predictionH5$matchmismatch == "NOVALUE",]$matchmismatch <- "D"

# prediction match / mismatch adjustment
predictionH5crna[predictionH5crna$matchmismatch == "NOVALUE",]$matchmismatch <- "D"

### dividing H5 and H7 virus as they have a different numeric scale and get the list of H7 and H5
codon <- databasepredictor(predictionH5, 15.5, 9, Model_linReg3.1, 
                           blocked = "yes", codon = "no",orientation = "vrna", 
                           correctionfactor = "N")

# now do the analysis for the vrna version of every part
codoncrna <- databasepredictor(predictionH5crna, 15.5, 9, Model_linReg3.1, 
                               blocked = "yes", codon = "no",
                               orientation = "crna", correctionfactor = 18)

# final step 
## organize insertions to graph
codon <- inserorganizerv2(codon)
codoncrna <- inserorganizerv2(codoncrna)
codon$insertion <- sub("^[0-9]+", "", codon$insertion)
codoncrna$insertion <- sub("^[0-9]+", "", codoncrna$insertion)

# export data to xlsx format
codonexport <- codon
codoncrnaexport <- codoncrna
codonexport[codonexport$predictedfreqdec < 10**-6,]$predictedfreqdec <- "BELOWthreshold"
codoncrnaexport[codoncrnaexport$predictedfreqdec < 10**-6,]$predictedfreqdec <- "BELOWthreshold"

write_xlsx(codonexport[order(codonexport$sample,codonexport$falsepos), ], 
           "predicted-crna-template.xlsx")
write_xlsx(codoncrnaexport[order(codoncrnaexport$sample,codoncrnaexport$falsepos), ], 
           "predicted-vrna-template.xlsx")

Plots

windowsFonts(Arial = windowsFont("Arial"))
codon[codon$sample == "2008-H7N7-8A" & codon$falsepos == "1017" &
        codon$predictedfreqdec > 10**-6,]$falsepos <- 1013

#mapp the insertion of 6A from 1979 

codon[codon$sample == "1979-H7N7-6A" & codon$falsepos == "1019" &
        codon$predictedfreqdec > 10**-6,]$falsepos <- 1013

codon[codon$sample == "1979-H7N7-6A" &
        codon$falsepos == "1019",]$template <- "G"

plotvrna <- plotinsertions(codon, 1026, 1012, 1030)
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once per session.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
## Scale for y is already present.
## Adding another scale for y, which will replace the existing scale.
## Warning in geom_label_repel(aes(label = insertion), color = "darkviolet", :
## Ignoring unknown parameters: `check_overlap`
suppressWarnings(print(plotvrna))

# eclipse long insertion in the extreme of polyA stretch as they are likely to be mapped in the 5' extreme of the polyA stretch during vRNA syntesis, and are already present in the vRNA syntesis plot.

codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion == "AA", ]$falsepos <- 10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion == "AAA", ]$falsepos <- 10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion == "AAAA", ]$falsepos <- 10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion == "AAAAA", ]$falsepos <- 10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion == "AAAAAA", ]$falsepos <- 10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion == "AGAAAA", ]$falsepos <- 10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion == "AGAAAAA", ]$falsepos <- 10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion == "AGAAAAAA", ]$falsepos <- 10

#finally mapp correctly the AGA insertion in the H7N7-2008 virus, as this insertion is in reality observed as the GAA insertion
codoncrna[codoncrna$sample == "2008-H7N7-5A" &
            codoncrna$falsepos == "1022" &
            codoncrna$insertion == "AGA", ]$falsepos <- 1021

codoncrna[codoncrna$sample == "2008-H7N7-5A" &
            codoncrna$falsepos == "1021" &
            codoncrna$insertion == "AGA", ]$insertion <- "GAA"

codoncrna[codoncrna$sample == "2008-H7N7-5A" &
            codoncrna$falsepos == "1021", ]$template <- "G"

codoncrna[codoncrna$sample == "1979-H7N7-6A" &
            codoncrna$falsepos == "1019", ]$template <- "G"

plotcrna <- plotinsertions(codoncrna, 1026, 1012, 1030)
## Scale for y is already present.
## Adding another scale for y, which will replace the existing scale.
## Warning in geom_label_repel(aes(label = insertion), color = "darkviolet", :
## Ignoring unknown parameters: `check_overlap`
suppressWarnings(print(plotcrna))

# save figures in raw format
ggsave(
  plotvrna,
  filename = "fullplot-crna-as-template.png",
  device = "png",
  dpi = 400,
  limitsize = FALSE,
  height = 50,
  width = 12,
  units = "in"
)
